stemHtml:
You are planning to complete a flight with landing fuel of 2000 lb remaining. Due to structural limitations, the centre tank fuel must be used before the wing tanks. Using the following information, calculate the location of the CG on landing in inches aft of the datum.

Maximum Take-Off Mass: 152 000 lb
Actual Take-Off Mass: 85 000 lb
Take-off CG location: 638.00 inches aft of the datum
Fuel in centre tank at take-off: 16 000 lb
Fuel in wing tanks at take-off: 18 000 lb
Centre fuel tank centroid: 605.40 inches aft of the datum
Wing fuel tank centroid: 700.20 inches aft of the datum
